iti95:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti95:2.1: “Monks, there are these three ways of obtaining sensual pleasures.
iti95:2.3:
Those whose sensual pleasures are already provided,
those who delight in creating, those with control over what is created by others.
iti95:2.4: These are the three ways of obtaining sensual pleasures.”
iti95:3.1: Devas whose pleasures are already provided,
iti95:3.4: and any others enjoying sensual pleasures
iti95:3.5: in this state here or anywhere else,
iti95:5.1: Having cut the flow of greed
iti95:5.2: for lovely, alluring forms so hard to transcend,
iti95:5.4: they are, without remainder, totally unbound.
iti95:6.1: They, the wise, with an attainer-of-wisdom’s noble vision,
iti95:6.3: directly knowing the ending of birth,
